a:r.a:t: The system successfully enabled secure multi-factor attendance verification for academic sessions.
Real-time attendance tracking improved attendance monitoring efficiency for faculty members.
Faculty dashboards enabled live classroom monitoring, assignment handling, and performance analytics.
Students were able to access attendance reports, assignments, internal marks, and notifications through a unified dashboard.
The integration of GPS, QR, WiFi, and time-based validation improved the reliability and transparency of attendance verification in academic environments.
The centralized dashboard system enhanced communication between students and faculty through real-time reports, assignment updates, and attendance insights.

Jodi Hendrawan, Ika Devi Perwitasari, and Fajar Maulana,“QR Code-Based Attendance Systems in Education: A Systematic Literature Review on Data Accuracy and Sustainable School Management,”CESSMUDS Journal, vol. 1, no. 1, 2025.
“Enhancing Attendance Accuracy with QR Code and Real-Time Location Tracking,”International Journal of Advanced Engineering and Management (IJAEM), 2025.
Tailwind Labs. 2024. “Tailwind CSS Responsive Design Documentation.” Tailwind CSS Official Guide.
Google Developers. 2024. “Next.js and Responsive Web Application Development.” Google Development Documentation
Vinay Kumar et al.,“Smart Attendance System Using Biometric and GPS,”International Conference Research Paper, 2024.
Tailwind Labs. 2024. “Tailwind CSS Responsive Design Documentation.” Tailwind CSS Official Guide.
Kashif Ishaq and Samra Bibi,“IoT Based Smart Attendance System Using RFID: A Systematic Literature Review,”
Project Guide: Dr. R C Jeni Gracia
The study presents AttendX, a smart academic presence and attendance management system designed for educational institutions.
The system integrates multiple verification methods including GPS validation, QR authentication, WiFi-based campus verification, and time-bound attendance validation.
It aims to reduce proxy attendance and improve the reliability of academic attendance tracking.
Existing attendance systems mainly rely on manual methods or single-factor verification, which lack accuracy and automation.
AttendX provides a centralized and intelligent solution for students, faculty, and administrators through real-time monitoring and analytics.
